cvt1_task_a_large.description: Task A on 10-node topology with 36 packets: 3-way source branching, 5-hop paths, extended signal set.

cvt1_task_b_large.description: Task B on 10-node topology with 36 packets: ctx1 switches to xor_mask_0101.

cvt1_task_c_large.description: Task C on 10-node topology with 36 packets: ctx0=xor_mask_1010, ctx1=xor_mask_0101.
